summary: Completed frontend-only validation of VIN search typeahead/autocomplete dropdown feature in header and welcome hero sections. Tested 10 user stories covering dropdown behavior, keyboard navigation, click interactions, and edge cases.
passed_tests: Story 1: Header typeahead with partial VIN (1N4AL) - Dropdown appears with suggestions showing thumbnail/VIN fallback, title in title-case, lot/year/mileage, VIN in monospace yellow, and LIVE/CACHE chip
Story 2: Header typeahead with make text (nissan) - Dropdown shows 8 Nissan suggestions with LIVE chips, each with year and 17-char VIN
Story 3: Header click navigation - Clicking suggestion navigates to /cars/:vin and renders SingleCarPage with correct H1
Story 4: Welcome hero typeahead with full VIN (1N4AL3AP4FC574557) - Dropdown shows matching item with LIVE chip, click navigates to correct /cars/:vin page
Story 5: Short query handling - Single character input correctly does NOT trigger dropdown (min length is 2)
Story 6: No matches state - Invalid query (ZZZZZZ99999XXX) shows 'No matches' message with query highlighted and 'Open full lookup' CTA button (CSS text-transform: uppercase applied)
Story 7: Keyboard navigation - ArrowDown/ArrowUp highlights items (.is-hover class, aria-selected=true), Enter navigates to highlighted item, Escape closes dropdown
Story 8: Click outside behavior - Clicking outside dropdown closes it without navigation
Story 9: Independent inputs - Header and welcome inputs maintain separate values and don't interfere with each other
Story 10: No console errors - No React errors, no failed network calls (401s are expected for auth endpoints)

success_percentage.backend: N/A (backend endpoint already verified, frontend-only testing)
